subcodes.first_line: We behold, indeed, the mountains soaring through the signs of their exalted Lord, and the trees stirred by the breezes of God, and yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نری الجبال تطیر من آیات ربها المتعال و الاشجار تحرک من نفحات الله ولکن
